2026-04-17T09:17:41.9661232Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-17T09:17:41.9662261Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-17T09:17:41.9663351Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-17T09:17:41.9664079Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-17T09:17:41.9664687Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-17T09:17:41.9665166Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-17T09:17:41.9665505Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-17T09:17:41.9665882Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-17T09:17:41.9666236Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-17T09:17:41.9666696Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-17T09:17:41.9667108Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-17T09:17:41.9667668Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-17T09:17:41.9668194Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

The migration added new generated sources, custom model overrides, and set up the `1.2.0-beta.1` version. However, the README was migrated with documentation issues.\n\n## Gaps Found\n\n- **Incorrect service description** (copy-paste error): `README.md` line 7 reads *\"This library supports managing Microsoft Azure Customer Insights resources.\"* — it should describe Azure Data Box resources, not Customer Insights.\n- **Empty Key concepts section**: The `## Key concepts` section links only to the generic Azure SDK intro page. It should describe the primary types: `DataBoxJobResource`, `DataBoxJobCollection`, and the extension methods on `ResourceGroupResource` and `SubscriptionResource`.\n- **No inline code samples**: The `## Examples` section contains no C# code snippets — only a link to generic management library samples. At minimum it should show how to authenticate/create a client, list Data Box jobs in a subscription, and get/create a Data Box job.\n- **No sample test file**: There is no `tests/Samples/` directory or any `Sample*.cs` test file to back the README snippets via the repo's snippet-generation tooling.\n- **Empty CHANGELOG for 1.2.0-beta.1**: The new version section has empty `### Features Added`, `### Breaking Changes`, etc. subsections, with no notes reflecting the TypeSpec migration.\n\n\u003cdetails\u003e\n\u003csummary\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/summary\u003e\n\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\n\n### Step 1: Modify files\n\n#### Fix the incorrect description in README.md\n\n**File:** `sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/README.md`  \n**Action:** Edit\n\nReplace:\n```markdown\nThis library supports managing Microsoft Azure Customer Insights resources.\n```\nWith:\n```markdown\nThis library supports managing Microsoft Azure Data Box resources.\n```\n\n#### Expand the Key concepts section in README.md\n\n**File:** `sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/README.md`  \n**Action:** Edit — replace the existing `## Key concepts` section body with:\n\n```markdown\n## Key concepts\n\n### DataBoxJobResource\n\n`DataBoxJobResource` represents a single Azure Data Box job and provides operations to get, update, cancel, and delete the job, as well as to retrieve shipping labels and delivery information.\n\n### DataBoxJobCollection\n\n`DataBoxJobCollection` provides operations to list and create Data Box jobs scoped to a resource group.\n\n### Extension methods\n\n`DataBoxExtensions` adds helper methods to:\n- `ResourceGroupResource` — retrieve a `DataBoxJobCollection`, get a single job by name, list available SKUs, validate inputs, and get region configuration.\n- `SubscriptionResource` — enumerate all Data Box jobs across the subscription, validate addresses, and get region configuration.\n\n### Thread safety and additional concepts\n\nAll client instance methods are thread-safe. See [Azure.Core concepts](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/core/Azure.Core/README.md) for client options, response access, retry policies, and logging.\n```\n\n#### Add a snippet placeholder to the Examples section\n\n**File:** `sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/README.md`  \n**Action:** Edit — replace the existing `## Examples` section with:\n\n```markdown\n## Examples\n\n### Authenticate the client and get all Data Box jobs in a subscription\n\n```C# Snippet:DataBox_ListJobs\n```\n```\n\n#### Update CHANGELOG for 1.2.0-beta.1\n\n**File:** `sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/CHANGELOG.md`  \n**Action:** Edit — populate the empty `## 1.2.0-beta.1 (Unreleased)` section:\n\n```markdown\n## 1.2.0-beta.1 (Unreleased)\n\n### Other Changes\n\n- Migrated SDK generation from AutoRest to TypeSpec (Management Plane Generator).\n```\n\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\n\nCreate a new sample test file:\n\n**File:** `sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/tests/Samples/Sample1_ListDataBoxJobs.cs`  \n**Action:** Create\n\n```csharp\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\n\nusing System;\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\nusing Azure.Identity;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox;\nusing NUnit.Framework;\n\nnamespace Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox.Tests.Samples\n{\n    public class Sample1_ListDataBoxJobs : SamplesBase\u003cDataBoxManagementTestEnvironment\u003e\n    {\n        [Test]\n        [AsyncOnly]\n        public async Task ListJobsAsync()\n        {\n            #region Snippet:DataBox_ListJobs\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\n            var subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\n\n            await foreach (DataBoxJobResource job in subscription.GetDataBoxJobsAsync())\n            {\n                Console.WriteLine($\"Job: {job.Data.Name}, Status: {job.Data.Status}\");\n            }\n            #endregion\n        }\n    }\n}\n```\n\nAdd the snippet placeholder to the README (see Step 1 above) at the `## Examples` section:\n\n```\n```C# Snippet:DataBox_ListJobs\n```\n```\n\nThe `Update-Snippets.ps1` script will automatically populate this block with the code from the `#region Snippet:DataBox_ListJobs` / `#endregion` markers in the test file.\n\n### Step 3: Verify README structure\n\nCurrent README section order is correct. The following sections need content changes per this issue:\n\n| Section | Status | Action |\n|---|---|---|\n| Getting started — Install the package | ✅ OK | None |\n| Getting started — Prerequisites | ✅ OK | None |\n| Getting started — Authenticate the client | ✅ OK (links to quickstart) | None |\n| Key concepts | ⚠️ Generic only | Add resource type descriptions (Step 1) |\n| Examples | ⚠️ No inline code | Add snippet placeholder + sample test (Steps 1 \u0026 2) |\n| Troubleshooting | ✅ OK | None |\n| Next steps | ✅ OK | None |\n| Contributing | ✅ OK | None |\n\nReference: `sdk/keyvault/Azure.Security.KeyVault.Secrets/README.md`\n\n### Step 4: Validate\n\nRun these commands in order:\n\n1. `dotnet build sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/`\n2. `dotnet test sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/ --filter TestCategory!=Live`\n3. `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 databox` — verify that the README is updated with the snippet content\n4. `eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 databox` — regenerate public API listing if any public types changed\n5. `dotnet format sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/`\n\n\u003c/details\u003e\n\n## Next Steps\n\n\u003e [!TIP]\n\u003e **Ready for automated implementation?** Assign this issue to **@copilot** to have Copilot coding agent implement the changes described in the Implementation Guide above\n","title":"[DataBox] Docs: Fix incorrect service description and add code samples to README"},"name":"create_issue"}}}
